texto: We are quite open, however, to looking at acquisitions and there are opportunities that we periodically consider. and I think that may be something we do in the future, but I must say that there is no commitment to that at the present time in any form or size.
explicacao: Orientação direta de David Milne sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. A afirmação “We are quite open, however, to looking at acquisitions and there are opportunities that we period…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, time, commitment, útil em momentos de commitment.

frase_original: We are quite open, however, to looking at acquisitions and there are opportunities that we periodically consider. and I think that may be something we do in the future, but I must say that there is no commitment to that at the present time in any form or size.

texto: We are also fortunate in being in quite a sheltered environment, in terms of people moving on to do other things, because there are relatively few companies in Scotland that are looking for the skill set that we've developed.
explicacao: Orientação direta de David Milne sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “We are also fortunate in being in quite a sheltered environment, in terms of people moving on to …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, moving, people, útil em momentos de people e environment.
